issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {Baroque Works} type, not if a card is on board.

Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The card prevents attack, which requires a duration-based restriction, not a Rest action. Should use 'GiveKeyword' with keyword 'CannotAttack' and duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until end of opponent's next turn).

Missing duration specification. Text 'cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next turn' requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' to indicate the restriction applies during opponent's turn phases.
